def main():
    # Parse command line arguments
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Import test cases from Excel to TestLink')
    parser.add_argument('--excel', required=False, default='Template_WIP.xlsx',
                        help='Path to Excel file with test cases')
    parser.add_argument('--output', required=False, default='testlink_import.sql',
                        help='Output SQL file path')
    parser.add_argument('--suite', required=False, type=int, default=2,
                        help='TestLink test suite ID (default: 2)')
    parser.add_argument('--author', required=False, type=int, default=1,
